exhibits.title: Election-week deployment
exhibits.body: ~₹7.5L committed on 6 Jun 2024, two sessions after the election-result drawdown — ICICI, HDFC, JIOFIN, IDBI, Adani Green, Phoenix. Exited through June–July.

exhibits.title: OLA Electric IPO flip
exhibits.body: 2,441 shares allotted at ₹76, sold at ₹100.26. Absent from broker P&L (IPO cost basis); recovered by reconciling a ₹1.85L settlement-ledger gap.

exhibits.title: Research with capital committed
exhibits.body: Initiated independent coverage on Triveni Turbine; bought 284 sh at ₹703.79. Marked −26% by May 2025; averaged 10 sh at ₹539 into the drawdown; exited all 294 at ₹709.90 in May 2026, three dividends collected.
